body_txt: A subtrope of Evil Sounds Deep . In musical theatre, Voice Types are often stereotypes too: the main hero will often be tenor if male or soprano if female. If the villain is female, however, she will often sing alto. This is quite often the case if the villainess is Large and in Charge . Altos themselves frequently refer to their options as "witches, bitches, and britches" (crossdressing roles as boys or young men). This would be the "bitches" part of that triad. Compare other tropes for characters with deep voices: Authority Sounds Deep , for socially powerful characters; Baritone of Strength note Despite the name, it applies to characters of all genders for strong characters; and finally, Power Makes Your Voice Deep , when a character's voice becomes deeper after they gain some sort of power.
